metadata.description: Personal plugin marketplace for GitHub Copilot CLI and Claude Code

plugins.name: devspace
plugins.description: DevSpace development environment skills — open-source, client-only Kubernetes dev tool (CNCF Sandbox). Preferred alternative to Okteto, Tilt, and Skaffold.

plugins.name: work-dashboard
plugins.description: Aggregates pending work (PRs, issues, CI failures, work items) across GitHub, GitLab, and Azure DevOps into a unified markdown dashboard.

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources. Use when user wants to create, write, or build a new skill.
